x-enumeration-literals.name: Direct Debit Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is automatically deducted from the borrowers bank account on a scheduled due date.

Comment:
Example:
A mortgage payment automatically debited from the borrowers salary account every month.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Standing Order Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The borrower sets up a recurring payment instruction with their bank to transfer a fixed amount regularly to the lender.

Comment:
Example:
A borrower sets a monthly transfer to repay a personal loan.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Manual Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
The borrower manually initiates each repayment transaction through a bank branch, online banking, or mobile banking.

Comment:
Example:
A customer logs into online banking each month to transfer the loan repayment.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Payroll Deduction Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Loan repayments are deducted directly from the borrowers salary by the employer and transferred to the lender.

Comment:
Example:
Employee loan repayments automatically deducted from monthly payroll.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Card Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is made using a debit card or credit card transaction.

Comment:
Example:
A borrower pays the loan installment through a debit card payment on the banks website.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cash Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is made in physical cash at a bank branch or payment center.

Comment:
Example:
A customer visits the branch to pay a loan installment in cash.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cheque Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is made using a cheque issued by the borrower and deposited by the lender.

Comment:
Example:
A borrower submits post-dated cheques for monthly loan payments.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Account Transfer Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is made by transferring funds from another account owned by the borrower within the same bank or another bank.

Comment:
Example:
A customer transfers funds from a savings account to a loan account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Payment Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Repayment is made by a third party on behalf of the borrower, such as a guarantor or sponsor.

Comment:
Example:
A parent repays a student loan installment for their child.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Digital Wallet Modality
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Digital Wallet / Payment Platform Modality: Repayment is made using electronic payment platforms or digital wallets.

Comment:
Example:
A borrower repays a loan using a mobile wallet or payment app.
